name: Symbol of the Lost

effects: Summon a Frostborn Crystal for 9 seconds Ally effect: Damaging within 7 squares Blizzard: Creates a swarm of snowflakes for 100 armor piercing damage Cold Snap: Deals 200 damage and inflicts Slowed for 2 seconds to enemies within 7 tiles every 2 seconds
